_comment: Shared golden fixture for the canonical talk slugify(). Consumed by BOTH tests/test_talk_slug.py (tools/talk_slug.py) and tests/test_talk_slug.js (site/js/talk_slug.js) so the Python and JS implementations cannot diverge silently. Algorithm: strip [^a-zA-Z0-9 -], whitespace -> '-', collapse '-+' -> '-', trim leading/trailing '-'. Case is preserved (NOT title-cased).

cases.input: Sahasrara Puja: How it was decided
